Off Calendar Sep-23-2021 Continued To Nov-17-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order
Off Calendar Jul-20-2021 Off Calendar

MOTION TO STRIKE
Off Calendar Sep-22-2021 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. DAWN C. SWEATT, Esq. of Berliner Cohen, LLP (Tel: 408-286-5800) for plaintiff/cross-defendants PMK Contractors, LLC; Bay Area Concrete, LLC; Bay Area Concrete, LLC dba Slurry Waste Solutions; Bay Area Hydrovac, LLC; Slurry Solutions, LLC dba Slurry Waste Solutions, LLC; Economy Trucking Services, Inc.; Preet Johal and Kevin Olivero;
Atty. AMY M. GALLEGOS, Esq. of Jenner & Block LLP (Tel: 213-239-5100) for defendant Pacific Gas and Electric Company;
Atty. COREY WILSON, Esq. of Rencher Law Group, P.C. (Tel: 415-877-4486) for cross-defendant Ryan Kooistra and CCI Management, LLC;
Atty. IAN B. KELLEY, Esq. of Law Offices of Ian B. Kelley (Tel: 415-581-0889) for cross-defendant Yadwinder Singh in case no. CGC-20-587568.

HEARING RE: CROSS-DEFENDANT BAY AREA CONCRETE, LLC, BAY AREA CONCRETE, LLC, PMK CONTRACTORS, LLC, BAY AREA HYDROVAC, LLC, SLURRY SOLUTIONS, LLC, ECONOMY TRUCKING SERVICES, INC., PREET JOHAL, AND KEVIN OLIVERO'S MOTION TO STRIKE.

Matter discussed. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff and cross-defendants' motion to strike the Code of Civil Procedure Sec. 170.6 challenge to discovery referee Brad Bening is denied.

(See Word minutes for complete ruling.)

Order signed.

The Court continues this matter to September 29, 2021 at 9:30 a.m. as to the selection of the discovery referee. The parties may submit a stipulation to the court prior to the hearing if the parties are able to reach an agreement as to the new discovery referee.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/EPS)

DEMURRER to CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-22-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. DAWN C. SWEATT, Esq. of Berliner Cohen, LLP (Tel: 408-286-5800) for plaintiff/cross-defendants PMK Contractors, LLC; Bay Area Concrete, LLC; Bay Area Concrete, LLC dba Slurry Waste Solutions; Bay Area Hydrovac, LLC; Slurry Solutions, LLC dba Slurry Waste Solutions, LLC; Economy Trucking Services, Inc.; Preet Johal and Kevin Olivero;
Atty. AMY M. GALLEGOS, Esq. of Jenner & Block LLP (Tel: 213-239-5100) for defendant Pacific Gas and Electric Company;
Atty. COREY WILSON, Esq. of Rencher Law Group, P.C. (Tel: 415-877-4486) for cross-defendant Ryan Kooistra and CCI Management, LLC;
Atty. IAN B. KELLEY, Esq. of Law Offices of Ian B. Kelley (Tel: 415-581-0889) for cross-defendant Yadwinder Singh in case no. CGC-20-587568.

HEARING RE: CROSS-DEFENDANT KEVIN OLIVERO'S DEMURRER TO CROSS-COMPLAINT.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Cross-Defendant Kevin Olivero's demurrer to PG&E's cross-complaint is overruled in part and sustained in part.

(See Word minutes for complete ruling.)

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/EPS)

DEMURRER to CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-17-2021 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: CROSS-DEFENDANT KEVIN OLIVERO'S DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Cross-Defendant's demurrer is ordered off calendar for noncompliance with Code of Civil Procedure section 430.41, which requires a declaration showing a "meet and confer in person or by telephone" before a demurrer may be filed. The parties are ordered immediately to meet and confer. Cross- Defendant's response to the complaint is now due by September 14, 2021.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)
